job.title: Senior AI Search Engineer
job.description: Build production candidate discovery systems using Python, semantic search, NLP, retrieval augmented generation, APIs, PostgreSQL, and cloud deployment. Improve ranking quality and latency with measurable experiments.

candidates.name: Aarav Mehta
candidates.headline: AI search engineer building retrieval systems
candidates.summary: Designed semantic search and RAG services for a job marketplace. Shipped Python APIs backed by PostgreSQL on AWS and improved search relevance through offline evaluation.

candidates.name: Diya Nair
candidates.headline: ML engineer focused on NLP platforms
candidates.summary: Built Python NLP pipelines, LLM evaluation tooling, and Kubernetes services on AWS. Worked with vector databases and API-based product integrations.

candidates.name: Kabir Singh
candidates.headline: Backend Python developer
candidates.summary: Developed REST APIs and PostgreSQL services for ecommerce products. Deployed Docker applications to AWS and maintained CI CD pipelines.

candidates.name: Meera Rao
candidates.headline: Frontend engineer and design systems specialist
candidates.summary: Creates accessible interfaces with React and TypeScript. Led UI platform migrations and component library adoption.

candidates.name: Rohan Iyer
candidates.headline: Data scientist researching information retrieval
candidates.summary: Built NLP ranking experiments in Python and evaluated semantic search models. Familiar with PostgreSQL, AWS, FastAPI, and retrieval augmented generation prototypes.
